meaning: n.摘要,概略,<美> 履历vt.再继续,重新开始,重新占用,再用,恢复
examples: They thought that he should resume his kingly duties.
I was given the all clear by the doctor to resume playing.
It shows how to prepare a resume, and gives tips on applying for jobs.
Mr Li also said that the six-party talks on the North's controversial programme must resume.
Today Iran said it plans to resume work at one of its nuclear plants early next week.
